title: Just More Races
body:
# Intro:

Tired of the original survival mode? Try other races. There are currently 5 races to choose from, namely: Human, Ghost, Lich, Ghoul, and Deep Sea Clan.

**Human**: They possess great creativity and have endless possibilities.

**Ghost**:The ghosts wandering among humans are particularly belligerent when in hunting mode. They usually have no way to heal themselves through normal means.

**Lich**:They were once despised mages who transformed into a special kind of creature and remain unwelcome to this day.

**Ghoul**: Ghouls are grotesque, flesh-eating creatures that haunt the dark corners of the world. They are known for their ravenous hunger and aggressive behavior, making them a formidable foe for any player who encounters them.

**Deep Sea Clan**: Deep Sea Clan are mysterious, deep-sea dwellers with unique abilities, making them a rare and intriguing choice for players seeking a challenging underwater adventure.




## About Special Ability:

Each race has its own special abilities.

Human：Enter Run Mode and gain positive effects.

Ghost:Enter Hunt Mode and Shade Mode.

Lich:Shoot a Big Fireball and attack mobs by magic.

Ghoul:Enter Swift Mode and highlight nearby mobs.

Deep Sea Clan: Change Weather and gain trident.

## About Other Information:

Q:How to change race?

A:You can choose the races you like when you enter a new world in the first time.


Q:I forget which races I chose.

A:Press F9 to check your race.
